home.worriesDescription: Liege of the one, the only Lord Bendtner
home.shortVersionBody: Hi, I'm Siddhu. As you can probably tell from my having bothered to create a personal website, I'm a bit of a nerd. I live in London, play cricket very badly, and waste far too much of my life worrying about Arsenal.
home.leagueWinSuffix: seconds since we won the league at White Hart Lane.
home.whatIDoBodyIntro: I am a Principal Engineer/Director at
home.whatIDoBodyMiddle: I lead multiple engineering teams across the UK and EU for Cisco Security Cloud Control's Firewall Manager (formerly known as CDO). My primary focus is on delivering a coherent, automatable experience for
home.whatIDoBodyOutro: who offer firewalling-as-a-service to their customers. I am also responsible for the API-first automation and programmability toolchains for our cloud firewall offerings.

contact.heading: Contact me
contact.introPrefix: You can contact me by either e-mailing
contact.formSuccess: Thanks for your interest! An e-mail's been sent to me using a Cloudflare worker, and I'll get back to you as soon as I see it!
